experience.title: AI Solutions Developer
details: Leveraged Azure AI Foundry to develop enterprise wide internal LLM Tool (EVA) used by ~3,000 internal users.
Built agentic backend for EVA to support code interpreter, document upload/download, web search, and RAG.
Architected and built a scalable RAG pipeline for internal customers to curate and deploy RAG Agents using Azure AI Search.
Worked with users  to continuosly improve EVA.
Aided in creation of best practices and sustainable use of Gen AI.

experience.title: Data Scientist
details: Served as lead technical contributor for a sales opportunity ranking system.
Developed a predictive model using XGBoost. Model output is being used to create leads for sales teams around the country.
Engineered 6 source of truth data assets in Google Cloud for the Commercial Service Analytics team.
Developed pipelines to extract, transform, and load data for multiple use cases.

experience.title: Data Analyst
details: Conducted an objective analysis to uncover discrepancies in reporting and customer experience with 3rd party ticketing service.
Developed a web app using Python and Streamlit that allows users to extract their metadata from Tableau Dashboards and Alteryx Workflows.

experience.title: EPIC Analytics & Data Science Intern · Trane Technologies
details: Led a project to improve copper price prediction accuracy using machine learning methods.
Created an automated tool for injecting and testing new variables in an existing model workflow.
Used Python and core data science libraries (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/Keras).

experience.title: Operations Student Worker · University of St. Thomas
details: Processed and indexed registrar documents with high attention to record quality.
Supported incoming, current, and former students through operations requests.

experience.title: Baker / Market Sales · T-Rex Cookies
details: Handled end-to-end product prep, sales, and customer interactions in market settings.
Developed consistency and communication under fast-paced operational constraints.

education.title: University of St. Thomas
details: B.S. in Data Analytics
B.A. in Economics
Minor in Computer Science
